mechanics.excerpt: The CMS is the finest academy in the Federated Suns State Command and regarded by many as the best the Inner Sphere With the possible exception of the new Focht War College on Tukayyid the CMS boasts the most advanced training facilities in existence_ Some question how much this actually improves the quality of the education, but few dispute the abilities of CMS graduates to their faces.
